Defendant Sysco San Francisco, Inc.'S Motion To Consolidate Actions Cgc-16-554634 And Cgc-16-554622
Off Calendar Jun-06-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. BRYAN C. SWAIM OF THE BORDIN MARTORELL LLP, TEL. NO. 1-323-457-2110 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT SYSCO SAN FRANCISCO BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. MATTHEW SOLEIMANPOUR OF THE MATTHEW LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. 1-855-303-7771 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF IN CASE NUMBER 554634 BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - Defendant Sysco San Francisco, Inc.'S Motion To Consolidate Actions Cgc-16-554634 And Cgc-16-554622 is taken off calendar per the request of the moving party in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 =302/hk

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-16-554634 WITH CASE CGC-16-554622
Off Calendar Jun-01-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MATTHEW SOLEMANPOUR OF THE MATTHEWS LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. 1-855-303-7771 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF HARTFORD INSURANCE COMPANY BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. BRYAN SWAIM OF THE BORDIN MATORELL LLP, TEL. NO. 1-323-457-2110 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT SYSCO SAN FRANCISCO, INC.

RULING - The matter was discussed. DEFENDANT SYSCO SAN FRANCISCO, INC.'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-16-554634 WITH CASE CGC-16-554622 is continued to June 6, 2017 for counsels to agree on a trial date. If they agree on one, they need to send a stipulated Order indicating the new trial date and vacating the July date and assigning the lower case number as the lead case and consolidation is for all purposes. The matter will be taken off calendar, if a Stipulation and order is submitted to the court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Irene Tofft, CSR # 12313 =302/hk
